test_cases.input: Political documentary about election monitoring in a developing country. Director: first-time feature director. No broadcast deal confirmed yet. Full credits and one key subject provided.
test_cases.notes: Three synopsis lengths were genuinely differentiated in scope and emphasis. Production Notes was correctly adjusted for a first-time director — focused on the project's origins rather than director's track record. No confirmed broadcast was handled cleanly.

test_cases.input: Music documentary about an aging jazz musician. Full production details including festival history, critical quotes, streaming deal with a major platform.
test_cases.notes: Critical quotes were integrated naturally into the Production Notes. Subject profile captured the musician's biography in relation to the film rather than as a standalone biography. All three synopsis lengths worked for their stated contexts.

test_cases.input: Short documentary (22 minutes) about a local community art project. Minimal credits. No broadcast partner. Festival submission context.
test_cases.notes: Scale was correctly adjusted for a short film — Production Notes was brief and specific rather than padding. Festival submission context informed the synopsis tone. Thin credits block was handled cleanly.
